Name: Allowed payment methods
Description: The payment methods that can be used to pay the invoice
Options: Credit or Debit Card (credit_or_debit_card); ACH (ach); SEPA (sepa); BACS (bacs); PADS (pads)

Name: Annual recurring revenue
Description: The annual recurring revenue from the subscription.

Name: Annual recurring revenue in company currency
Description: The annual recurring revenue from the subscription, in your company's currency

Name: Automated sales taxes enabled
Description: Whether or not automated sales taxes is enabled for subscription

Name: Automatically email invoices
Description: Determines if recurring invoices are automatically emailed to the customer on each billing date

Name: Churn date
Description: Indicates when the subscription status has changed to INACTIVE or UNPAID.

Name: Address types to collect
Description: The types of addresses that are collected while paying the invoice.

Name: Collection process
Description: Describes the payment collection process for the subscription i.e. automatic vs manual (not yet supported)

Name: Contact email
Description: The email address of the contact associated to the subscription. This is the primary email address used for subscription related emails.

Name: Created by user ID
Description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Object create date/time
Description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

Name: Currency code
Description: The currency code of the subscription.

Name: Invoice Comments
Description: Comments to the invoice recipient

Name: Invoice Creation
Description: An indicator of whether a subscription is invoiced through HubSpot's Commerce Hub.

Name: Language
Description: Language of the invoice

Name: Last modification reason
Description: Reason for last subscription edit

Name: Subscription modified on
Description: The timestamp in epoch milliseconds for when a subscription was last modified.

Name: Last payment amount
Description: The amount that was charged for the subscription during the most recent billing period.

Name: Last Payment Date
Description: When the last payment processed for the subscription

Name: Locale
Description: Locale of the invoice

Name: Merged record IDs
Description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Monthly recurring revenue
Description: The monthly recurring revenue from the subscription.

Name: Monthly recurring revenue in company currency
Description: The monthly recurring revenue from the subscription, in your company's currency

Name: Name
Description: The name of the subscription.

Name: Net Payment Terms
Description: Refers to the period, expressed in days (e.g., Net 30), within which subscription invoices must be paid

Name: Next payment amount
Description: The value to be processed on next payment date. If next payment date is null, the property is set to empty.

Name: Next billing date
Description: The next billing date where the subscription will be invoiced. If the collection method value is automatic_payments, the subscription will be automatically charged. If the collection method value is manual_payments, an invoice will be created.

Name: Number of completed payments
Description: The number of payments that have been successfully processed for the subscription.

Name: Number of expected payments
Description: The number of total payments expected for the subscription.

Name: Record ID
Description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Record source detail 1
Description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source detail 2
Description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source detail 3
Description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source
Description: How this record was created.

Name: Payment Enabled
Description: Indicates if a checkout link is included on invoices from subscriptions with a manual collection method

Name: Payment method
Description: The payment method on file for this subscription.

Name: Payment method source at creation
Description: Indicates where a payment method is collected when creating a subscription
Options: Checkout (checkout); Payment method on file (payment_method_on_file); First invoice (first_invoice); Migration (migration)

Name: Payment source
Description: The object or tool that created the subscription.
Options: Payment Link (sales_checkout); Test (test); Quote (quote); Migration (migration); Billing (billing)

Name: Payment source ID
Description: The unique ID for the object or tool that created the the subscription. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

Name: Processor
Description: The processor for collecting subscription payments.

Name: End date
Description: The date the subscription will end.

Name: Recurring billing frequency
Description: How often the customer is billed for the subscription.
Options: Daily (daily); Weekly (weekly); Every two weeks (biweekly); Monthly (monthly); Quarterly (quarterly); Semi-annually (per_six_months); Annually (annually); Every two years (per_two_years); Every three years (per_three_years); Every four years (per_four_years); Every five years (per_five_years)

Name: Start date
Description: The date the subscription is scheduled to start (which is the day of the first payment).

Name: Status
Description: The status of the subscription.
Options: Active (active) [READ-ONLY]; Past due (past_due) [READ-ONLY]; Unpaid (unpaid) [READ-ONLY]; Canceled (canceled); Expired (expired); Scheduled (scheduled); Paused (paused) [READ-ONLY]

Name: Store payment method at checkout
Description: Allow customers to store their payment method at checkout.

Name: Tax ID
Description: The account tax IDs listed on the generated invoice. The tax ID includes a tax ID type and a tax ID number. Valid tax ids are managed in invoice settings.

Name: Total collected amount
Description: The total amount collected from the subscription. The amount is in the currency of the subscription.

Name: Total Remaining Amount
Description: The total amount remaining to be collected for subscriptions with a fixed number of payments. The amount is in the currency of the subscription.

Name: Update payment method link
Description: Link to update payment method on this subscription

Name: Updated by user ID
Description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Owner assigned date
Description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Subscription owner
Description: The owner of the subscription.

Name: Owner's main team
Description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.
